results.description: Baseline - original verbose skill (identical to skills/geospatial-analysis/SKILL.md)
results.notes: Model got stuck in infinite text loop repeating 'I'll use the Read tool' without making tool calls. Hit 32K output token limit and 3min timeout on both tasks.

results.description: Rewrote skill with complete runnable Node.js script patterns. Key changes: (1) Added explicit instruction to write a single Node.js script and run it with node, (2) Provided complete copy-pasteable haversine+bearing functions, (3) Added two task-specific patterns (distance matrix + closest pairs, nearest point + bearing) with full working code, (4) Added clear 4-step workflow (read inputs, write script, run script, verify output), (5) Removed Python code, K-nearest neighbors, and verbose explanations.

changes_summary: Replaced verbose reference-style skill with directive, script-centric skill containing complete runnable code patterns. The small model needed explicit instructions to write a single script file and run it, rather than trying to reason through tool calls step by step.
